name: The Sins // Helluva Boss , Hazbin Hotel
description:
AnyPOV! Sleepover with Lucifer, Satan, Beelzebub, Mammon, Asmodeus, Leviathan, Belphagor, and User!

1000 follower special!

Holy shit. Woah. Wow. I'm sorta figuring this is going to be a LONG yap session, so feel free to skip to the end, but... Thank you. ALL of you. Whether you're following, or not. You're all (presumably, I mean you've already come this far, right?) taking the time out of your day to read my writing. To interact with it, and chat with it, and you've all, in a way, gotten me here. It genuinely means so much to me, so I don't know. Whether you leave reviews or not, it still makes me feel amazing to know people like my stuff. I'm much more confident in writing now, in being silly, in giving detail- I don't know. I'm yapping, but I also wanted to thank a few important people to me in the past few months I've been on here. I might forget some people, so if you're not on here- don't worry! It was probably a mistake! But, here goes. I'm gonna go down from my creator list in my bio, then I'm gonna add some extra people, too.

ajridsiejjqaaaaaa: Thank you, for being my friend, especially in my earlier days of janitor. It meant so much to see someone wanting to talk to me here, and on the rare occasion that you do post, they're always awesome and well written.

B0red.as.h3ll: they've since switched accounts, and we didn't talk too too much, but they're an immaculate Vox bot creator, so thank you for making them.

♡𝕊𝕙𝕖𝕒𝔹𝕦𝕥𝕥𝕖𝕣♡ #free Palestine 🇵🇸: they privated most of their bots by now, but thank you for being awesome sauce, and really kind, as well as having awesome Lucifer bots.

mango.smoothie..: In my mind, I see them as the first person here who made me feel like people liked me, like I could write and not have it be in vain. They were the first "big creator" who put me in their bio, and it made me feel like I could keep it up. Thank you.

Phantom knight.3: they closed their account, but they made awesome Vox bots, so thank you.

p03swifeywife: Hasn't posted in awhile, but once again, thank you for the awesome bots.

Venti's235246CumDump: They've also privated all their Hazbin bots, but I made my first ever request on their page, and they helped inspire me to make bots. So, thank you for more or less helping to start this bullshit I run.

exocetnyan: thank you for awesome sauce bots

pentagramsfall.: thank you for the Vox bots.

Goose_w!thaknife: Thank you for awesome Lucifer bots and being a cool person.

batenthusiast: I think they quit before I came to the platform, but thank you for really good bots.

yourfavgiek: thank you for being an awesome person and making awesome bots.

d3ad.ang1e: thank you for the immaculate smut bots.

SpookyParanoia: it's a really cool person and I love their writing style, so thank you.

notimetoexplain: Has, once again, privated their bots, but they were actually immaculate, and they seemed really kind too, so thank you.

Genericusername12220janitoredition: thank you for the Mammon aesthetic and for having great bots.

Areallycoolperson: Accurate name, and used to have awesome bots thank you.

Chknuggetgrease: Thank you for the great Vox bots.

amebeloved: They're really cool and have great Lucifer bots, thank you.

VoidRosey: Multi fandom and one of my first consistent supporters. Thank you for the requests you left back then.

AyoIdk: Thank you for being super kind, they also have immaculate bots.

A
creator: Im.Gonna.Balls
